PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?movieLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q172678 wdt:P166 ?award .
  ?award rdfs:label ?awardLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?awardLabel) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?awardLabel)) , "british academy") && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?awardLabel)) , "supporting actor"))
  ?award wdt:P585 ?awardYear .
  FILTER(YEAR(?awardYear) = 1995)
  .
  ?award wdt:P1686 ?movie .
  ?movie rdfs:label ?movieLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?movieLabel) = "en")
  .
}
